emails.subject: And the beat goes on...
emails.body: And the beat goes on... I'm still getting the silent treatment!

emails.subject: And the beat goes on...
emails.body: And the beat goes on... I'm still getting the silent treatment!

emails.subject: Re: And the beat goes on...
emails.body: Re: And the beat goes on... Well, at least she's not snapping at you. She just needs to grow up and learn to deal with it. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Tana Jones@ECT 06/21/00 05:11 PM

emails.subject: Re: And the beat goes on...
emails.body: She's not too far away from snapping...! I'm afraid to say anything. Marie Heard@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS 06/21/2000 05:27 PM
